description: Composition Blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandrain collar with a V-neck, pin tucks running from the shoulders to the bust, three-quarter sleeves with lace and pin tuck detailing, and has a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear your art on the go and flaunt your ethno-modern sense of style with ease by slipping into this kurta from aneri. The fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the pin tucks and lace detailing heightens the fashion statement of this kurta. Team it with leggings or patialas and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
